Description: Registered chooserole.unity3d variants. Raw bundle swapping is forbidden unless a variant is explicitly marked Allowed.

ReferenceScenes.Notes: Contains ChooseRoleGrassOverlay and is the structural reference for the foot-ground layer.
Legacy restore source that still matches the pre-repair drifted scene. Keep blocked as a restore input.

Variants.Label: Current login-stack live variant
Variants.Notes: Current live/login-stack chooserole bundle. Built from the drifted project scene that is missing ChooseRoleGrassOverlay. Do not republish as a fix baseline.

Variants.Label: Icebaseline structural reference
Variants.Notes: Reference-only bundle produced from the backup scene that contains ChooseRoleGrassOverlay. Use this to recover missing scene objects into source, then rebuild. Do not publish by raw bundle copy.

Variants.Label: Misnamed apk-baseline backup
Variants.Notes: Historically labeled as apk-baseline in backups, but it is not the valid role-select baseline.

Variants.Label: Ground material probe variant
Variants.Notes: Diagnostic material probe build. Never use as a release or hotfix source.

Variants.Label: Switch-to-pjzr intermediate variant
Variants.Notes: Intermediate conversion artifact without a paired manifest. Never publish.

Variants.Label: Legacy raw replacement snapshot
Variants.Notes: Historical raw replacement bundle that was copied into chooserole during prior recovery attempts. Not a controlled rebuild output and must remain blocked.

Variants.Label: Controlled source rebuild candidate
Variants.Notes: Built on 2026-04-15 from F:\MUSF\Client\Unity\Assets\Scenes\GameMap\ChooseRole.unity after restoring ChooseRoleGrassOverlay. Promoted to Allowed on 2026-04-15 after runtime verification on device 127.0.0.1:16384 confirmed the app loaded chooserole.unity3d from /storage/emulated/0/Android/data/com.quanzhilieshou.bytedance.gamecenter/files/Android/星辰战纪 with the matching 68eafd3c/655c97d2 hashes and no new fatal exception during choose-role load.

Variants.Label: Baseline restore intermediate
Variants.Notes: Early baseline-restore experiment. Not approved for publish.

Variants.Label: Currentcore baseline-login variant
Variants.Notes: Legacy login-era chooserole build. Do not reuse.

Variants.Label: MuMu update snapshot variant
Variants.Notes: Snapshot from an emulator update workflow. Not a controlled baseline.
